case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. JOSUE HAZAEL XIU DZIB

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-17-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-17-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC REPRESENTED BY JHONATTAN HERRADA, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT JOSUE HAZAEL XIU DZIB DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DZIB, JOSUE HAZAEL XIU $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,605.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DZIB, JOSUE HAZAEL XIU ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-17-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $55.00) SERVED AUG-30-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DZIB, JOSUE HAZAEL XIU
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR OPORTUN, INC. ASSIGNED TO JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEM, LLC
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,284.66 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT DZIB, JOSUE HAZAEL XIU
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY FILED BY ASSIGNEE JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEM, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT DZIB, JOSUE HAZAEL XIU
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
